title: Moving Object
result_description: A still object appears to slide or creep across the scene on its own while you react to it.

inputs.name: object_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Lock the camera and film the scene WITH the object sitting still.

inputs.name: clean_plate
inputs.what_to_film: Film a clean plate of the same scene WITHOUT the object (for patching).

inputs.name: reaction_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Optionally film yourself reacting to the 'moving' object.

params.note: clean_plate on the main track, object clip as the overlay
mask / cut out just the object from the overlay
animate the object sliding / creeping across the scene
add ease on the keyframes and a subtle shadow that moves with the object

result.description: The masked object drifts across the locked-off scene with a matching shadow.
success_criteria: Object moves smoothly via keyframes while the background stays still
Clean plate hides the object's original resting spot
